examples: It was wonderful to watch her fingers moving deftly and unerringly.
An unerringly professional team greet and treat clients.
She had seized unerringly on the fact that most disturbed him.
Berbatov exchanged passes with midfielder Gibson before unerringly driving a low shot into the bottom corner of Foster's net.
Alonso's initial effort was blocked by the wall but he half-volleyed the rebound unerringly into the bottom corner.
